description_long: This object consists of three rectangular filing cabinets arranged side by side, each with a boxy, utilitarian design and a uniform brown finish resembling wood or a wood-like laminate. The cabinets are segmented into horizontal sections, indicating the presence of multiple drawers per unit. The tops of the cabinets are flat, with one cabinet showing a slightly misaligned or partially open top drawer, suggesting functionality. There are no visible handles, label holders, or locks on the drawer faces, giving the cabinets a minimalist and industrial appearance. The surfaces appear matte and slightly textured, with subtle grain patterns visible across the exterior. This set would be suitable for storing documents or supplies in an urban environment such as a garage, warehouse, or office storage area.
description: A set of three brown, boxy filing cabinets with multiple horizontal drawers and a flat, matte finish. The design is minimalist, with no visible handles or label holders.
description_view_0: Three rectangular filing cabinets are shown from the front, displaying their segmented drawer faces and flat tops.
description_view_1: The cabinets are viewed from the side, emphasizing their depth and the alignment of the drawers.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the plain backs of the cabinets, with the drawer segmentation still visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side view highlights the slightly misaligned or open top drawer on one cabinet.
